fwu.name: Database infrastructure
fwu.intent: Establish the SQLite database layer with GORM, WAL mode, and migration framework.

boundaries.description: Pure Go SQLite driver setup and GORM integration
Migration framework with versioned SQL files
WAL mode configuration and FK enforcement
Table definitions for domain entities (owned by FWU-01.1.02)

dependencies.description: Depends on database layer being available

design_decisions.resolution: modernc.org/sqlite — pure Go, no CGO requirement
design_decisions.rationale: NFR14 mandates no CGO for deployment simplicity

interface_contracts.description: Database connection handle and migration runner

verification_gates.expectation: Database opens with WAL mode and FK enforcement verified by test
No CGO required — verified by build constraint

epic.name: Data platform
epic.description: All persistence and data management capabilities

capability.name: Structured storage
capability.description: Ability to store and retrieve structured data reliably

ncs.name: Data persistence
ncs.description: System must persist data across restarts

csfs.name: Zero-downtime deployments
csfs.description: Database migrations must not cause downtime

dependency_status.description: Depends on database layer being available
